_comment: Default subconscious-scheduler tasks. Seeded into ~/.config/phone-agent/scheduler_tasks.json on first use; edit the INSTALLED copy (or use phone.scheduler.add_task) — this repo copy is only the seed. {laptop_host} and {ollama_port} are expanded from ~/.config/phone-agent/config.json at execution time.

tasks.name: Flake Update Check
tasks.description: Poll the GitHub API for nixpkgs channel movement (no nix on the phone). Result is queued for the laptop agent.

tasks.name: Ollama Model Preload
tasks.description: List the laptop's Ollama models via its HTTP API (D3: no SSH). Skipped when the laptop is unreachable; the result is queued for its next wake.

tasks.name: Laptop Health Check
tasks.description: Probe the laptop's Ollama HTTP endpoint to verify it is alive (the phone cannot MCP-call the laptop). Logs reachability.

tasks.name: Ingest Log Cleanup
tasks.description: Remove ingest artifacts older than 30 days so storage does not creep.

tasks.name: Geofence Change Detect
tasks.description: Sample coarse location every 15 minutes so the laptop agent can see geofence transitions.
